rationale: The cited paper is used directly in the methods section as the source for a riskiness measure in Study 4 ("riskiness of the loan application"). This is a concrete measurement borrowing rather than a purely generic literature mention. At the same time, the citing paper does not rely on the cited paper for its core theory of racial discrimination; the role is primarily methodological.
relation_description: The citing paper adapts the riskiness measurement approach from Kim and Lakshmanan (2021) to measure perceived loan risk in its lending experiment. In this sense, it applies a construct operationalization from the cited work in a different research context.
